nasb.text: Now Caiaphas was the one who had advised the Jews that it was expedient for one man to die on behalf of the people.

esv.text: It was Caiaphas who had advised the Jews that it would be expedient that one man should die for the people.

cnv.text: 該亞法就是從前向猶太人提議說“一個人代替人民死，這是有益的”那個人。

ccb.text: 这个该亚法以前曾对犹太人建议说：“让祂一个人替众人死对你们更好。”

csbs.text: 该亚法就是曾经向那些犹太人建议“一个人替民众死是有益处的”那个人。
